events.event_title: Epstein assigned to Special Housing Unit (SHU) at Metropolitan Correctional Center
events.description: Epstein assigned to Special Housing Unit (SHU) at Metropolitan Correctional Center
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein explicitly named as being assigned to Special Housing Unit at Metropolitan Correctional Center.

evidence.excerpt: Epstein was assigned to a cell in the SHU on July 7 due to media coverage of his case and inmate awareness of his notoriety. SHU inmates are securely separated from general population inmates and kept locked in their cells for approximately 23 hours a day.
evidence.summary: Epstein assigned to Special Housing Unit (SHU) at Metropolitan Correctional Center

events.description: Travel notification: Epstein traveling from NYC to Palm Beach (Sept 30), planned return to USVI (Oct 13)

evidence.excerpt: Mr. Epstein will travel today from his vacation home in New York, New York to his vacation home in Palm Beach, Florida where he expects to stay until October 13, 2018. On October 13, 2018, Mr. Epstein plans to return from his vacation home in Palm Beach, Florida to his permanent residence in the U.S Virgin Islands
evidence.summary: Travel notification: Epstein traveling from NYC to Palm Beach (Sept 30), planned return to USVI (Oct 13)

events.event_title: Testimony describing Epstein's Manhattan residence at 9 East 71st Street near Central Park
events.description: Testimony describing Epstein's Manhattan residence at 9 East 71st Street near Central Park

evidence.excerpt: Turning to the next slide, did he maintain an address in Manhattan located at 9 East 71st Street? A. Yes. Q. Can you please describe that property for the grand jury? A. It's a seven-story home. It's located near Central Park. It's reportedly the largest residence in Manhattan.
evidence.summary: Testimony describing Epstein's Manhattan residence at 9 East 71st Street near Central Park

evidence.excerpt: During the course of this investigation have you learned where Epstein maintained properties in the 1990s? A. Yes. Q. Where did he maintain properties? A. New York, Palm Beach, and New Mexico.
evidence.summary: Testimony about Epstein maintaining properties in New York, Palm Beach, and New Mexico during the 1990s
